grants.title: MeitY AI Innovation Programme
grants.description: Applied Research Track: ₹2–5Cr for AI projects at academic institutions (70% funded). Focus: healthcare, agriculture, education, smart cities.

grants.title: MeitY Cyber Security Research Grant
grants.description: Research proposals in cybersecurity. Submission by email with subject 'Proposal for Research in Cyber Security'.

grants.title: MeitY-NSF Joint Research Programme
grants.description: India-US joint call. Focus: semiconductors, next-gen communications, cybersecurity, green tech, intelligent transport. Indian team funded by MeitY.

grants.title: SPARC — Scheme for Promotion of Academic and Research Collaboration
grants.description: Joint proposals between Indian institutions and top-100 foreign universities. Covers exchange visits, joint workshops, and seed research grants.

grants.title: SPARC Proposal Template
grants.description: SPARC call: SPARC Proposal Template

grants.title: Login & Submit Proposal
grants.description: SPARC call: Login & Submit Proposal

grants.title: IMPRINT-2 Research Grant (IIT-led)
grants.description: Impacting Research Innovation and Technology. Funds India-centric problems across 10 technology domains. IIT/NIT-led, but any Indian institution can collaborate.

grants.title: SERB-POWER Research Grant (Women Researchers)
grants.amount: Up to ₹30 Lakhs (Level II — SASTRA eligible) / ₹60L (Level I)
grants.description: Promotes women researchers in science and engineering. Two levels: Level I for IITs/IISc/NITs/Central Univ (up to ₹60L, 3yr); Level II for State/Private institutions like SASTRA (up to ₹30L, 3yr). Regular academic/research position required. All S&E frontier areas.

grants.title: ANRF National Post Doctoral Fellowship (N-PDF)
grants.description: Postdoctoral fellowship for Indian researchers. Provides mentor support at premier Indian institutes. Rolling applications.

grants.title: SERB/ANRF Ramanujan Fellowship
grants.description: For Indian scientists returning from abroad or working overseas to take up research positions in India. 5-year fellowship.

grants.title: ANRF TARE (Teachers Associateship for Research Excellence)
grants.description: Allows college teachers to work in nearby IITs/IISc labs. Bridges teaching and research, supports ≤3 years.

grants.title: ANRF Start-up Research Grant (SRG)
grants.description: For faculty who obtained PhD ≤5 years ago and are in first faculty position. Supports independent research setup. Rolling applications throughout year. Cannot simultaneously hold NPDF or TARE.

grants.title: ANRF Prime Minister Early Career Research Grant (PM-ECRG)
grants.description: New ANRF scheme replacing SERB-ECRA. Supports early career researchers at Indian institutions. INSPIRE Faculty, Ramanujan, and Ramalingaswami Fellows are explicitly eligible. Budget up to ₹1L/year each for travel and contingency.

grants.title: ANRF SIRE — Short-term International Research Experience
grants.description: Supports Indian researchers for short-term research visits (1–6 months) to overseas labs. For PhD students, postdocs, and early career faculty. Rolling applications.

grants.title: ANRF Swarnajayanti Fellowship
grants.description: Prestigious DST/ANRF fellowship for scientists below 45 years with exceptional track record. 5-year fellowship with complete academic freedom. Annual call; highly competitive (~15 awarded/year).

grants.title: CSIR Junior Research Fellowship (JRF)
grants.description: For NET-qualified candidates to pursue PhD in science. Awarded twice yearly (June & December cycle via CSIR-NET).

grants.title: CSIR Senior Research Fellowship (SRF)
grants.description: Upgrade from JRF after 2 years with good performance. Also direct SRF (Gates) scheme for experienced researchers.

grants.title: CSIR Research Associateship (RA)
grants.description: Postdoctoral fellowship at CSIR institutes or universities. For PhD holders within 3 years of degree award.

grants.title: DBT Junior Research Fellowship (DBT-JRF)
grants.description: For pursuing PhD in Biotechnology/Life Sciences. Selected via written test (BET). Twice yearly.

grants.title: DBT Ramalingaswami Re-entry Fellowship
grants.description: Prestigious re-entry fellowship for Indian scientists working abroad, to return and build independent labs in India. 5-year tenure.

grants.title: DBT Research Associateship (DBT-RA)
grants.description: Postdoctoral programme in biotechnology and life sciences. PhD holders within 3 years of degree award. Hosted at any recognized Indian institution with an established research group.

grants.title: DBT-IYBA — Innovative Young Biotechnologist Award
grants.description: Annual award + research grant for outstanding young researchers in biotechnology under 35 years. Provides 3-year research support in addition to the award. One of DBT's most competitive early-career recognitions.

grants.title: DBT-BUILDER Programme
grants.description: Biotechnology/Life Sciences University-Based Interdisciplinary Life Sciences Department and Research (BUILDER). Infrastructure and research support for universities to build interdisciplinary life sciences programs.

grants.title: DST INSPIRE Faculty Award
grants.description: 5-year tenure track fellowship for young Indian scientists under 32 to work in any Indian academic or R&D institution.

grants.title: DST Women Scientist Scheme-A (WOS-A)
grants.description: Research grants for women scientists who had a career break. Supports independent research for 3 years.

grants.title: DST KVPY (Kishore Vaigyanik Protsahan Yojana) — Fellowship
grants.description: Scholarship-cum-fellowship for students in BS/BTech pursuing basic sciences, to be encouraged into research careers.

grants.title: ICMR Junior Research Fellowship (ICMR-JRF)
grants.description: For pursuing PhD in biomedical and health sciences. Selected via ICMR-JRF exam held annually.

grants.title: ICMR International Fellowship for Indian Biomedical Scientists
grants.amount: Travel + monthly allowance (as per ICMR norms)
grants.description: Supports Indian biomedical scientists to work at advanced research labs abroad for 3–6 months. Covers travel, maintenance allowance, and research costs. Annual call. Strong career development opportunity for mid-career researchers.

grants.title: ICMR ANVESHAN — Small Research Grant (ICMR SMALL)
grants.description: ICMR's new small grant scheme (rebranded). Investigator-initiated research proposals in biomedical and health sciences. Faster turnaround than ad-hoc grants. Follow-on ANVESHAN available for ongoing work.

grants.title: ICMR NISCHA — Intermediate Research Grant
grants.description: ICMR intermediate-scale grant for established researchers. Mid-tier between ANVESHAN (small) and full ad-hoc grants. For health research with clear translational potential.

grants.title: Prime Minister's Research Fellowship (PMRF)
grants.description: Flagship fellowship for BTech/MSc graduates joining PhD at IITs, IISc, NITs, IISERs. Twice yearly intake (Feb & July).

grants.title: INSA Young Scientist Award
grants.description: Annual award for Indian scientists under 35 for outstanding contributions. Comes with a medal, citation, and research support grant. One of the most prestigious young scientist recognitions in India.

grants.title: DST Young Scientist Award (SERC Fast Track / SRG equivalent)
grants.description: ANRF/SERB early career support for young scientists. Fast-track funding mechanism for scientists within 5 years of PhD. Superseded partially by SRG; check ANRF portal for current active scheme name.

grants.title: NASI Young Scientist Platinum Jubilee Award
grants.description: National Academy of Sciences India award for scientists under 35. Includes cash prize, medal, and visibility for early career researchers.

grants.title: IASc-INSA-NASI Joint Summer Research Fellowship
grants.description: Summer research fellowships for final-year BSc/BE/MSc students to work with fellows of the three science academies. Good pipeline for future PhD students; also useful for faculty seeking collaborative network.

grants.title: ANRF International Travel Support (ITS)
grants.description: Supports Indian researchers to present papers at international conferences abroad. Rolling applications throughout the year.

grants.title: DBT Overseas Associateship
grants.description: Supports Indian scientists with PhDs to work at overseas labs for 6–12 months. Covers travel, subsistence, and research costs.

grants.title: DBT-EMBL Short-Term Visit Programme
grants.description: Joint DBT-EMBL programme supporting short visits by Indian researchers to EMBL labs in Heidelberg and other sites.

grants.title: CSIR Travel Grant for International Conferences
grants.description: Financial support for scientists/researchers to attend/present at international conferences. Applications reviewed on a rolling basis.

grants.title: INSA International Bilateral Exchange Programme
grants.description: Exchange visits with foreign academies (Royal Society, NAS, JSPS, CNRS, DFG). For Indian scientists visiting abroad or hosting foreign scientists.

grants.title: INSA Senior Scientist Fellowship
grants.description: For INSA Fellows and active scientists post-superannuation to continue research. Provides honorarium and research support.

grants.title: DST-NIDHI PRAYAS Grant (Proof of Concept)
grants.description: DST National Initiative for Developing and Harnessing Innovations (NIDHI). PRAYAS supports proof-of-concept development for innovators with technology-based ideas. Up to ₹10L grant for prototyping at NIDHI-PRAYAS host institutes.

grants.title: DST-NIDHI Technology Business Incubator (TBI)
grants.description: Supports academic institutions in establishing technology business incubators. SASTRA could apply to host a TBI. Provides seed funding infrastructure, mentorship ecosystem, and connects startups to industry.

grants.title: BIRAC Biotechnology Ignition Grant (BIG)
grants.description: BIRAC's flagship early-stage support for biotech startups. Proof-of-concept funding for innovative biotech ideas. Open to individuals and companies. One of the most competitive biotech startup grants in India.

grants.title: BIRAC-SPARSH (Social Innovation Grant)
grants.description: BIRAC support for affordable and accessible innovations in healthcare and agriculture addressing underserved populations. Promotes frugal innovation and social entrepreneurship.

grants.title: Startup India Seed Fund Scheme (SISFS)
grants.description: DPIIT scheme with ₹945 Cr outlay. Grants via eligible incubators for proof-of-concept, prototype development, product trials, and market entry. Up to ₹20L as grant + up to ₹50L as convertible debentures. Disbursed through incubators — SASTRA incubation centre applies.

grants.title: MeitY TIDE 2.0 (Technology Incubation & Development)
grants.description: MeitY Technology Incubation and Development of Entrepreneurs scheme. Supports IT/AI/IoT/Cybersecurity/FinTech startups through academic incubators. Two tracks: Incubator Support (₹3.15Cr) + Startup Grants.

grants.title: ANRF PM Early Career Research Grant — Startup Research
grants.description: UGC Start-up Research Grant for newly appointed faculty (within 3 years of joining). Available at UGC 2(f)/12B institutions. Covers basic sciences, medical sciences, engineering. For establishing independent research.

grants.title: CEFIPRA Indo-French Joint Research Project (General)
grants.description: CEFIPRA/IFCPAR bilateral programme. Indian PI funded by DST; French PI by ANR. Covers joint research, researcher exchanges, workshops. All STEM disciplines. Proposals submitted in parallel to CEFIPRA (India) and ANR (France).

grants.title: CEFIPRA Indo-French ICT Research Programme
grants.description: ICT-focused bilateral call. Indian PI submits via CEFIPRA online + hard copy to CEFIPRA New Delhi; French PI submits to Inria separately. Focus: AI, networks, security, systems.

grants.title: IGSTC 2+2 Research Projects (Indo-German)
grants.description: Indo-German Science & Technology Centre flagship programme. 2 Indian + 2 German partners (academia + industry on each side). Applied research, technology transfer focus.

grants.title: IGSTC SING — Seed Networking Grant (Indo-German)
grants.description: Seed funding for initiating bilateral India-Germany research connections. Rolling call. Covers preliminary experiments, consumables, short visits, conference registration. Low-barrier entry point for Indo-German collaboration.

grants.title: DST-DFG Indo-German Joint Research (Science & Engineering)
grants.description: Joint research projects between Indian (DST/ANRF-funded) and German (DFG-funded) PIs. Proposals submitted in parallel — Indian PI to DST, German PI to DFG via elan system. Both agencies must recommend funding.

grants.title: DST-JSPS India-Japan Cooperative Science Programme (IJCSP)
grants.amount: Mobility grant — travel, per diem, workshop costs
grants.description: Joint research projects and workshops/seminars between Indian (DST) and Japanese (JSPS) researchers. Parallel submission required. Focus on mobility — exchange visits, seminars. Results notified Apr/May following year.

grants.title: Newton-Bhabha Fund — Indo-UK Joint Research
grants.description: UK-India bilateral fund managed by British Council and UKRI. Supports joint research, PhD placements, researcher exchanges, and workshops. Indian PI funded by DST/DBT/other Indian agency; UK PI by UKRI.

grants.title: UKRI-DST India Joint Initiative (via GCRF/IUK)
grants.description: Various UKRI calls explicitly open to India-UK partnerships. Indian partner typically funded by DST/DBT; UK partner by UKRI. Check UKRI opportunity finder filtered by 'India' for current calls.

grants.title: IUSSTF Joint Research Projects (Indo-US)
grants.description: Indo-US Science & Technology Forum. Indian PI funded by DST; US PI funded by NSF/NIH/DOE depending on theme. Also includes Virtual Network Centres and Joint Workshops.

grants.title: MeitY-NSF Joint Research Programme
grants.description: India-US bilateral for semiconductors, next-gen communications, cybersecurity, green tech, intelligent transport. Indian PI applies to MeitY; US PI to NSF. Single joint proposal, reviewed by NSF as coordinating agency.

grants.title: DST-MOST Indo-Israel Joint Research (S&T)
grants.description: Bilateral programme between DST (India) and Ministry of Science & Technology (Israel). Joint research in all S&T areas. Proposals submitted in parallel. Annual calls typically open Oct-Dec.

grants.title: DST-NRF Indo-Korea Joint Research Programme
grants.description: Joint research between Indian (DST) and Korean (NRF) researchers. Covers joint R&D projects and bilateral visits. Annual call.

grants.title: DST-CSIRO India-Australia Strategic Research Fund
grants.description: Joint bilateral fund between DST and CSIRO (Australia). Focus on areas of mutual interest: agriculture, water, clean energy, health. Indian PI funded by DST, Australian by CSIRO.

grants.title: AICTE Research Promotion Scheme (RPS)
grants.description: Promotes research culture in AICTE-approved institutions. Two tracks: Basic/Applied Research (₹20L, 2yr) and Development Research (₹30L, 3yr). Less competitive than DST/DBT — underutilised by faculty at deemed universities. SASTRA is directly eligible. Submit via AICTE web portal.

grants.title: AICTE Margdarshan — Faculty Development Grant
grants.description: AICTE faculty development and capacity building grants. Covers short-term courses, workshops, and training programmes at premier institutions. Also includes Quality Improvement Programme (QIP) support.

grants.title: AICTE-INAE (Indian National Academy of Engineering) Research Grant
grants.description: Joint AICTE-INAE scheme for frontier engineering research. Includes Young Engineer Award track with research support. For engineering disciplines at AICTE institutions.
